name: itsolpowers
description: ITSOL engineering skills and Claude Code subagents for task intake, application technology migration, file-based functional planning, subagent execution, TDD, implementation, debugging, review, security, infrastructure, and production readiness.

interface.shortDescription: ITSOL workflows, migration, planning gates, TDD, and review.
interface.longDescription: ITSOL Powers provides Codex skills for routing engineering tasks across application technology migration and rewrites, file-based functional planning, approved business and technical plan markdown artifacts, approved technical fix plans for bugs, subagent-driven execution, TDD, implementation, debugging, self-review, security review, infrastructure design, deployment readiness, and incident analysis using ITSOL best-practice documents.
defaultPrompt: Use ITSOL Powers to classify this task and choose the right skills.
For application rewrites or technology migrations, inventory behavior, choose a safe migration strategy, and plan incremental slices before implementation.
For functional work, write and require approved Business Plan and Technical Plan markdown files before implementation.
For subagent-driven work, split tasks, set concurrency, review each implementation with a separate subagent, and commit reviewed slices.
For bugfixes, gather evidence and require an approved Technical Fix Plan before implementation.
Use ITSOL TDD workflow before changing production code.
Review this change against ITSOL security and infrastructure practices.
Debug this issue using ITSOL task and incident workflows.
